home.subtitle: Embark on amazing treasure hunts powered by AR, geolocation, and pure adventure

features.mapsDesc: Navigate through stunning locations with real-time GPS tracking
features.arDesc: Discover hidden treasures using augmented reality technology
features.gamificationDesc: Earn points, unlock achievements, and climb the leaderboard
features.socialDesc: Join communities and compete with players worldwide

home.joinThousands: Join thousands of players discovering treasure hunts around the world

about.title: About Lootopia
about.subtitle: Discover the story behind the world's most exciting treasure hunt platform
about.missionDesc: We aim to revolutionize how people explore and interact with the world around them through immersive treasure hunts powered by augmented reality and geolocation technology.
about.entertainmentDesc: We create engaging and immersive experiences that blend gaming with real-world exploration.
about.accessibilityDesc: Our platform is designed to be inclusive and accessible to everyone, regardless of skill level.
about.innovationDesc: We constantly push the boundaries of what's possible with AR, geolocation, and gamification.
about.communityDesc: We believe in building a vibrant community of adventurers, partners, and innovators.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have a question or feedback? We'd love to hear from you!

messages.success: Message sent successfully! We'll get back to you soon.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Lootopia is a digital treasure hunt platform that combines AR, geolocation, and gamification to create immersive adventures.
faq.a2: Sign up for a free account, explore available hunts, and start your first adventure. No special equipment needed.
faq.q3: Can I create my own hunts?
faq.a3: Yes. Partners and organizations can create custom hunts for their audiences through our partner dashboard.
faq.a4: Yes. Lootopia is free to play. We also offer premium features for enhanced experiences.

section1.title: 1. Introduction
section1.content: Lootopia ("we", "our", or "us") operates the Lootopia platform. This Privacy Policy explains our practices regarding the collection, use, and protection of your personal information.

section2.title: 2. Information We Collect
section2.content: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as: • Account information (name, email, username, password) • Profile information (avatar, bio, preferences) • Location data (for geolocation-based features) • Communication data (messages, support requests) • Payment information (processed securely by third parties)

section3.title: 3. How We Use Your Information
section3.content: We use the information we collect to: • Provide, maintain, and improve our services • Personalize your experience • Process transactions and send related information • Send technical notices and support messages • Respond to your inquiries and requests • Send marketing communications (with your consent) • Detect and prevent fraud and abuse • Comply with legal obligations

section4.title: 4. Information Sharing
section4.content: We do not sell or rent your personal information. We may share information with: • Service providers who assist in our operations • Law enforcement when required by law • Other users (only publicly shared information) • Business partners (with your consent)

section5.title: 5. Data Security
section5.content: We implement industry-standard security measures including encryption, secure authentication, and regular security audits. However, no system is completely secure. We cannot guarantee absolute security of your information.

section6.title: 6. Your Rights
section6.content: You have the right to access, modify, or delete your personal data. To exercise these rights, please contact us at privacy@lootopia.com

contact.title: Contact Our Privacy Team
contact.description: If you have any questions about our Privacy Policy or how we handle your data, please contact us:
contact.addressValue: Lootopia, 123 Adventure Street, San Francisco, CA 94105, USA
contact.responseValue: We will respond to privacy inquiries within 30 days.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.heroSubtitle: Please read these terms carefully. By using Lootopia, you agree to these terms.

section1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
section1.content: By accessing and using Lootopia, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provision of this agreement. If you do not agree to abide by the above, please do not use this service.

section2.title: 2. Use License
section2.content: Permission is granted to temporarily download one copy of the materials (information or software) on Lootopia for personal, non-commercial transitory viewing only. This is the grant of a license, not a transfer of title, and under this license you may not: • Modify or copy the materials • Use the materials for any commercial purpose or for any public display • Attempt to reverse engineer any software contained on Lootopia • Remove any copyright or other proprietary notations from the materials • Transfer the materials to another person or mirror the materials on any other server • Attempt to gain unauthorized access to any portion or feature of Lootopia • Violate any laws or regulations related to the access to or use of Lootopia

section3.title: 3. User Accounts
section3.content: When creating an account with Lootopia, you must provide accurate, complete, and current information. You are responsible for: • Maintaining the confidentiality of your password • All activities that occur under your account • Notifying us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account • Not sharing your account credentials with third parties. We reserve the right to terminate accounts that violate these terms.

section4.title: 4. User-Generated Content
section4.content: You may submit content (hunts, comments, messages) to Lootopia. By submitting content, you: • Grant Lootopia a perpetual, irrevocable license to use your content • Warrant that you own or have permission to use the content • Agree that your content does not infringe on any third-party rights • Accept that Lootopia may use your content for promotional purposes. We reserve the right to remove content that violates these terms or is inappropriate.

section5.title: 5. Intellectual Property Rights
section5.content: All materials on Lootopia, including but not limited to text, graphics, logos, images, audio clips, digital downloads, and data compilations, are the property of Lootopia or its content suppliers and are protected by international copyright laws.

section6.title: 6. Limitation of Liability
section6.content: THE MATERIALS ON LOOTOPIA ARE PROVIDED ON AN "AS IS" BASIS. LOOTOPIA MAKES NO WARRANTIES, EXPRESSED OR IMPLIED, AND HEREBY DISCLAIMS AND NEGATES ALL OTHER WARRANTIES.

notice.title: Important Notice
notice.content: These Terms of Service constitute a legally binding agreement between you and Lootopia. Please read them thoroughly. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you should not use our platform.

contact.title: Questions?
contact.description: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at:
contact.addressValue: Lootopia Legal Department, 123 Adventure Street, San Francisco, CA 94105, USA

loading.title: Loading the partner workspace
loading.subtitle: Verifying access and preparing the dashboard.

hero.title: Design, configure and manage your hunts on your own.
hero.subtitle: A guided workshop to quickly create playful trails consistent with your brand, while keeping clear, real-time analytics.

templates.title: Choose a template
templates.subtitle: A quick starting point to customize for each partner context.

retail.name: Store hunt
retail.description: Ideal for driving in-store traffic and showcasing a product range.
retail.objective: Boost store traffic and product discovery

step1.title: Window welcome
step1.description: Find the marker near the entrance.
step1.clue: Spot the entrance totem and scan the QR code.

step2.title: Mystery product
step2.clue: Find the shelf in the theme color.

step3.title: Final checkout
step3.clue: Enter the word revealed by the two previous steps.

event.name: Event trail
event.description: Perfect for a trade show, product launch or pop-up.
event.objective: Create a quick and memorable engagement journey

step1.title: Show entrance
step1.clue: Find the giant logo on the main booth.

step2.title: Mini quiz
step2.clue: Answer the question displayed on the welcome screen.

step3.title: Final photo
step3.clue: Capture the photo area to unlock the reward.

team.name: Team building
team.description: A collaborative experience to energize a team or a network.

step1.title: Team mission
step1.clue: Each group collects one half of the clue.

step2.title: Decoding
step2.clue: Combine the answers to form the final code.

step3.title: Group finale
step3.clue: Validate the final zone all together to win.

museum.name: Mysterious museum
museum.description: An adventure through a museum with riddles and hidden treasures.
museum.objective: Discover the artworks and solve mysteries

step1.title: Museum entrance
step1.description: Pick up your map and your guide.
step1.clue: Look for the totem at the entrance and scan it.

step2.title: Antiquities room
step2.clue: Find the Greek vase with the mysterious inscription.

step3.title: Painting gallery
step3.description: Admire the paintings and solve the riddle.
step3.clue: The painting with the Italian landscape holds the secret code.

config.title: Quick setup
config.subtitle: Keep only the useful settings: everything else stays consistent with the brand.

map.title: Hunt map
map.subtitle: Click a marker to select a step, or click the map to place the selected element.

steps.title: Steps and riddles
steps.subtitle: Select a step and adjust its content and its location on the map.
steps.newClue: Add a clear and simple clue.

preview.title: Player preview
preview.subtitle: The final view stays simple, guided and mobile-friendly.

analytics.title: Analytics tracking
analytics.subtitle: Monitor participation, friction points and drop-offs.

publish.title: Publishing and management
publish.subtitle: Choose the mode in the action bar at the bottom of the screen, then save.
publish.draftDesc: Work in progress, hidden from players.
publish.testDesc: Available to your team for validation.
publish.summary: The hunt {{name}} can be launched within its defined perimeter while staying true to the Lootopia visual identity.

notifications.stepAdded: New step added to the trail.
notifications.keepOneStep: You must keep at least one step.
notifications.clickToPlace: Click on the hunt map to position this step.
